title: IT Project Manager (Agile / Government Project)
description:
We are looking for IT Project Manager to lead government ICT projects, ensuring timely, budget-compliant delivery, meeting business needs and IT governance, collaborating with stakeholders.

  • Working Hours: Mon-Fri
  • Working Location: One North
  • Job Type: Contract
  • Salary Package: Up to $8,000 (basic) + AWS

Responsibilities

  • Oversee the entire project lifecycle, from initiation to closure, ensuring adherence to project goals and deliverables.
  • Develop detailed project plans, including scope, timeline, budget, and resource allocation.
  • Handle infrastructure projects efficiently and effectively.
  • Engage with key stakeholders, including business users, project team members, and external vendors.
  • Conduct regular project status meetings and provide updates to stakeholders.
  • Address and manage stakeholder expectations, resolving conflicts and issues promptly.
  • Ensure cohesive collaboration and effective team dynamics.
  • Ensure that user needs and feedback are incorporated into project deliverables.
  • Ensure that all project activities comply with IT governance frameworks and standards.
  • Implement quality control processes to ensure high standards of deliverables.
  • Monitor project budgets, ensuring that expenditures are within approved limits.
  • Identify, analyze, and resolve project-related issues and challenges.
  • Make informed decisions based on data analysis, project requirements, and stakeholder input.

Requirements:

  • Degree or Diploma in Computer Science, Information Systems, Information Technology, Computer or Electronics Engineering, or a related discipline.
  • Extensive Experiences in Project Management, experience participating in full software or product development cycles, preferably using Agile Methodology with past development experience.
  • Strong analytical, conceptualization, and problem-solving skills.
  • Excellent communication skills, both oral and written, with the ability to pitch ideas and influence stakeholders.
  • Project Management-related certifications such as CITPM, COMIT, or PMI is an added advantage.
  • Proven experience as a strong project manager with the ability to manage stakeholders and deliver project management artifacts.

By submitting your resume, you consent to the collection, use, and disclosure of your personal information per ScienTec’s Privacy Policy (scientecconsulting.com/privacy-policy).

This authorizes us to:

  • Contact you about potential opportunities.
  • Delete personal data as it is not required at this application stage.
  • All applications will be processed with strict confidence. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

Elane Yap Theng Yu- R1989397
ScienTec Consulting Pte Ltd - 11C5781

postedCompany.description:
An award-winning company founded in 2004, ScienTec has transformed organizations across Asia Pacific with our 4 principal services: Staffing, Specialist Search, Outsourcing and HR Consulting.

Our "People First, Always" core value underpins our mission to redefine the standards of HR services and deliver you top-tier candidate support, as reflected in our attainment of key accolades such as Recruitment Agency of the Year, Best Client Service, and Best Candidate Experience.


Our sector and functional coverage include ICT/technology, industrial engineering, and corporate services recruitment.


By submitting your resume, you give your express consent that ScienTec Consulting may use your personal information to process your job application and to contact you from time to time for future employment opportunities.

For further information on how ScienTec Consulting processes your personal information and how to access and correct your information, please read the ScienTec Consulting’s Privacy Policy (https://www.scientecconsulting.com/privacy-policy).

Please do not submit any sensitive personal data to us in your resume (such as government ID numbers, ethnicity, gender, religion, marital status) as we do not collect your personal data at this time.


All job applications will be processed with strict confidence and only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
